text:
Created attachment 193092
shell archive of py-psautohint port

Cantarell is the standard font of GNOME desktop environment. Since the source tarballs of cantarell-fonts include pre-compiled OpenType font files, this tool is not needed when installing cantarell-fonts from FreeBSD ports. It will be needed if you want to compile cantarell-fonts from a git checkout.
